eef6c85a46.label: HOME
eef6c85a46.desc: San nha chinh (Courtyard) - diem xuat phat vao moi mode. San PAN NGANG duoc (nut trong canh Explore/Town/Summon doi vi tri khi keo). Thanh menu duoi day la HUD co dinh.

739925704b.label: Settings
739925704b.desc: Cua so chon khung vien avatar (Frame)

e91a4cdc54.label: Event
e91a4cdc54.desc: Ban do su kien Awakened Wisdom (cac che do)

e72dd865e0.label: HOME
e72dd865e0.desc: San nha (nut Yard goc trai duoi)

c744fa0b6e.label: Settings
c744fa0b6e.desc: Hop thoai lien ket tai khoan (nhan 50 Jade)

a4a12df431.label: HOME
a4a12df431.desc: San nha (thong bao Soul DEF Bonus)

11fc5f017c.label: HOME
11fc5f017c.desc: San nha (thong bao trieu hoi SP)

1d811c3586.label: Explore
1d811c3586.desc: Chapter map near Six Realms Gates

94693fae24.label: Town
94693fae24.desc: Town district: Arena, Demon Parade, Mystic Trader

7003532d8f.label: Shikigami
7003532d8f.desc: Bo suu tap/quan ly THUC THAN (式神录). Xem tat ca thuc than da co (My Shikigami 2955). Loc theo rank: All/UR/SSR/SR/R/N. Click thuc than de xem chi tiet (Liking/Showcase/Profile/Promote thang cap). Vao tu HOME>Shikigami.

cf22d0b534.label: Exploration
cf22d0b534.desc: Man Tham Hiem (探索) - HUB FARM CHINH. Vao cac mode: Soul (御魂 farm ngoc hon trang bi), Realm Raid (突破 dot pha cuop tai nguyen), Secret Zone (秘闻 farm material), Area Boss, Spirit Venture, Champion Trial, Six Realms Gates. Ban do KEO ngang+doc duoc. Vao tu HOME>Explore.

2cea68932c.label: Soul
2cea68932c.desc: Man chon khu farm NGOC HON (御魂). 4 zone: Orochi (大蛇 boss ran 8 dau, ngoc tan cong), Sougenbi, Fallen Sun (中央城 - Weekly 50/Daily 50), Sea of Eternity (Weekly 30). Moi zone co Daily Souls (thuc than drop). Vao tu Exploration>Soul.

9197016791.label: SoulBattle
9197016791.desc: Man BATTLE ngoc hon (Orochi/御魂 副本). Chon boss + do kho (Lv7-10, Moar, Judgment) ben trai. Nut Challenge BAT DAU tran. Auto = tu danh, x12 = danh nhanh nhieu lan. Drops G5-G6 Souls (ngoc bac 5-6). Vao tu Soul>chon zone.

3fbd51f101.label: Shop
3fbd51f101.desc: Cua hang (商店). Tab: Consignment (寄售 ky gui), Illustration, Mystic (神秘 shop bi an), Soul Shop (mua ngoc hon), Skin (皮肤 trang phuc), General, S-Jade Shop (勾玉 mua bang ngoc xanh), Pack (礼包 goi qua). Trai: Treasure Park, Fortune Shop. Vao tu HOME>Shop.

75c482e9c1.label: ShopStreet
75c482e9c1.desc: Cua hang che do xem PHO (平安京 Heian-Kyo street view) - bien the cua Shop. Cac quay (S-Jade Shop, Skin, Mystic, Consignment, General, Soul, Mall) dat tren ban do pho. Thanh tab day giong Shop. Toggle tu Shop.

911e8f9a8a.label: OnmyojiInfo
911e8f9a8a.desc: Chi tiet ONMYOJI chinh (阴阳师, vd Kagura/Seimei). Xem chi so (ATK/HP/DEF/Speed/Crit), Skills (ky nang), Totem, Bios (tieu su), Sentry. Switch doi onmyoji. Stats xem chi tiet, Skin doi trang phuc. Vao tu HOME>Onmyoji.

10317f054b.label: Town
10317f054b.desc: Thi tran 平安京 (Heian-Kyo Town) - HUB lon nhieu mode PvP/event. Co: Arena (斗技 dau truong PvP), Demon Parade (百鬼夜行 dieu hanh quy), Retrospect (hoi tuong), Encounter, Itachiland, Mystic Trader (神秘商人). Thanh day = HUD co dinh giong HOME. Pan ngang duoc. Vao tu HOME>Town.

dd298238ba.label: ArenaHub
dd298238ba.desc: Sanh PvP (斗技 Arena) - chon che do dau. 3 mode: Daruma Arena (dau truong Daruma), Duel (dau don 1v1 xep hang), Draft Duel (dau draft chon luot, ban/pick). Vao tu Town>Arena.

c1cc1aaca8.label: DemonParade
c1cc1aaca8.desc: Event 百鬼夜行 (Demon Parade) - keo the/trieu hoi quy theo luot. Co Chance up (luot con lai), Invite friend (moi ban cung keo), Records (lich su), Enter (vao keo). Diem/ve hien thi (4764). Vao tu Town>DemonParade.

11f9c07f69.label: Summon
11f9c07f69.desc: Phong TRIEU HOI thuc than (画符/召唤 - ve bua). 3 loai bua: Normal (bua thuong - AR), Mystery (bua bi an - co the ra SSR/SP, QUAN TRONG), Jade (dung ngoc xanh 100). Co Scrolls (cuon trieu hoi), Shrine (den), Memory (hoi uc rut lai). Vao tu HOME>Summon.

32499ccb88.label: PlayerProfile
32499ccb88.desc: Popup HO SO nguoi choi (mo khi click avatar doi thu o RealmRaid/danh sach). Xem: ten, so likes, nut Message (nhan tin), Add Friend (ket ban), Page (xem trang ca nhan), Guild Invite (moi vao bang). close de dong. Mo tu RealmRaid>click avatar.

13d26c793c.label: SoulPreBattle
13d26c793c.desc: Man DAN TRAN truoc khi danh (deploy shikigami). Tap khu vuc de dat thuc than vao tran. Co Ready (bat dau danh), Preset (doi hinh luu), Adjust Soul (chinh ngoc), Bonus. Vao tu SoulBattle>Challenge.

dcff6c40fc.label: SoulInBattle
dcff6c40fc.desc: Man TRONG TRAN danh boss ngoc hon (combat). Damage numbers bay, thanh skill thuc than duoi day (Skill1-3, Normal attack). Auto = tu danh, x2 = tang toc, timer + luot (5/8). Vao tu SoulPreBattle>Ready.

9fc826addb.label: SecretZone
9fc826addb.desc: Bi Van (秘闻 Secret Zone) - thach dau cot truyen/chien thuat (Secret/Strategy Challenge). Danh sach cac chuong bi an (Arakawa, Fading Sakura, New Makeup, Venom...) - moi cai co cac tang. Enter de vao. Rare/Ranking phai. Vao tu Exploration>SecretZone.

f985b233c5.label: AreaBoss
f985b233c5.desc: Boss Khu Vuc (地域鬼王 Area Boss) - ban do the gioi chia theo vung dia ly (vd N.America). San boss khu vuc cung nguoi choi gan ban. Co Filter, Top in the Area (xep hang vung), Assembly Area (tap hop), Day (lich). Vao tu Exploration>AreaBoss.

1714520ac0.label: SpiritVenture
1714520ac0.desc: Spirit Venture - hub farm tai nguyen HANG NGAY (moi mode 2/2 luot/ngay). 6 mode: EXP Spirit (farm kinh nghiem), Coin Spirit (farm vang/kim tien), Kraken Zone (boss bach tuoc drop Soul/Evo), Enraged Kraken (cuoi tuan, manh hon), Mentorship Trial (thu thach su do), Shards (manh thuc than). Vao tu Exploration>SpiritVenture.

2aacb9e5ee.label: ChampionTrial
2aacb9e5ee.desc: Champion Trial (灵之契) - event nhan vat gioi han (vd Fujiwara no Michinaga). Co: Successor Trial (thu thach ke thua), Fujiwara Archives (Story cot truyen), Uncharted Dreams, Limited-time Challenge, Melodic Mastery (Skills). Co battle pass (Moonrise Pass) mua skin Totem. Vao tu Exploration>ChampionTrial.

33755d064b.label: TotemZone
33755d064b.desc: Totem Zone (御灵) - farm tu 4 THAN THU (totem): Dark Shinzu (rong), Dark Hakuro (soi), Dark Qinglong (ho), Dark Peacock (phuong). Moi cai drop SOUL (ngoc hon) + items. Chon than thu de danh. Vao tu Exploration>Totem.
